app.name: AI Reader
app.tagline: Read books and novels with AI — highlight passages, summarize on demand, and visualize ideas as you go.

stubs.comingSoonDescription: This part of AI Reader is still being built.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.emptyDescription: Highlight passages while reading and they'll show up here.

activity.title: Activity
activity.emptyDescription: Summaries, diagrams, and illustrations you generate with AI will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.emptyDescription: Preferences and integrations will live here once we add them.

library.title: Library
library.description: Your uploaded documents. PDF, DOCX, and Markdown supported.
library.emptyDescription: Upload your first PDF, DOCX, or Markdown to get started.
library.dialogDescription: PDF, DOCX, or Markdown — up to 20 MB.
library.unsupportedFormat: This file format isn't readable yet.

reader.commentsEmptyDescription: Highlight a passage to add your first note.
